productDisplayName: Nike Men's Colors Team India T-shirt
description: Composition:White knit t-shirt Wash care:Machine wash separately in cold water. Use mild detergent. Do not bleach. Avoid soaking. Remove promptly. Line dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do not iron directly on print/embroidery.Fitting:Comfort FitFlaunt to the world that India is on target to win the big cup. This white nike t-shirt by Gautam Gajbar, with an unorthodox print of the Indian tri-colour is the best way to show your support to the Indian cricket team. Team it up with smart casuals and wear it to all sporting arenas and casual outings.
